evidence_summary: Establish a temporary safe haven within the dark forest by transitioning from high-tension travel to exhausted rest. The visual tone must shift from the dread of the dense canopy to the localized, flickering warmth or moonlight of the log cottage interior.
The group finds a small log cottage for shelter. Dorothy and Toto settle down on a bed of dried leaves to sleep, while the Scarecrow remains standing watch through the night.
Fear $\rightarrow$ Exhausted relief/Vigilance.
The group enters the log_branch_cottage seeking refuge from the dark forest.
Dorothy and Toto are asleep on leaves while the_scarecrow stands watch in the shadows.
Finding shelter, settling into a bed of leaves, and establishing a night watch.
